isApprovalRequiredForAdd.description: If false, then approval isn't required for new requests in this policy.

isApprovalRequiredForUpdate.description: If false, then approval isn't required for updates to requests in this policy.

isRequestorJustificationRequired.description: If false, then requestor justification isn't required for updates to requests in this policy.

stages.description: If approval is required, the one, two or three elements of this collection define each of the stages of approval. An empty array is present if no approval is required.
